news.title: UAE reports a large dirham-backed stablecoin transaction involving FAB
news.body: Local media reported a Dh110m transaction using a UAE dirham-backed stablecoin, with First Abu Dhabi Bank mentioned as part of the initiative. If confirmed by official releases, it could signal accelerating real-world usage for AED-linked settlement rails.

news.title: Mercado Bitcoin announces $200M RWA issuance on Stellar Network
news.body: Brazil's largest crypto exchange Mercado Bitcoin announced a $200M tokenized RWA issuance on Stellar, with focus on private credit. 20% of MB custody is already RWA.

news.title: QNB issues Qatar's first native digital bond in $500M landmark deal
news.body: Qatar National Bank issued Qatar's first native digital bond, a $500 million landmark transaction. Issuance settled natively on DLT.

news.title: IHC, ADQ and FAB pioneer UAE Dirham-backed stablecoin
news.body: Three UAE institutions — IHC, ADQ and FAB — announced plans to launch a CBUAE-regulated Dirham-backed stablecoin issued by FAB.

news.title: Aptos approves Proposal 183: 2.1B APT supply cap and 100% gas burns
news.body: Aptos network passed Proposal 183 in March 2026 introducing a 2.1B APT hard supply cap, 100% gas-fee burns, and reduced staking rewards. BUIDL deployed $500M extra on Aptos.

news.title: MUFG Progmat pivots to Avalanche for tokenized securities
news.body: Japan's MUFG Progmat tokenization platform pivoted to Avalanche subnets in Feb 2026. MUFG issued public-offering digital subordinated bonds in Oct 2025.

news.title: ADGM FSRA announces FRT rules effective January 1, 2026
news.body: Abu Dhabi Global Market's FSRA presented enhancements to its Virtual Asset framework. Fiat-Referenced Token rules effective Jan 1, 2026 with 20+ regulated firms operating.

news.title: SEC is said to ready plan for trading tokenized stocks (innovation exemption)
news.summary: Bloomberg reports the SEC may release an innovation exemption framework to enable trading digital versions of securities (tokenized stocks) as soon as this week.

news.title: FinCEN and OFAC publish proposed rule for stablecoin issuers under the GENIUS Act (30-day comment period)
news.body: El 10 Abr 2026 FinCEN y OFAC emitieron una Proposed Rule para implementar requisitos AML/CFT y sanciones para permitted payment stablecoin issuers bajo GENIUS Act; comentarios hasta 9 Jun 2026.

news.title: Broadridge DLR: record volumes in March (+392% YoY)
news.summary: Broadridge reportó que su plataforma Distributed Ledger Repo (DLR) procesó un promedio de ~$354B/día en marzo y casi $8T en volumen mensual (marzo), con crecimiento interanual de 392%.

news.title: Treasury Proposes Rule to Implement the GENIUS Act's ...
news.summary: U.S. Treasury (FinCEN/OFAC) issued a proposed rule implementing GENIUS Act AML and sanctions compliance requirements for permitted payment stablecoin issuers.

news.title: Securitize CEO: Tokenized Stocks Will DOUBLE Crypto - YouTube
news.summary:
🚨 The future of Wall Street is going on-chain.

At Consensus 2026 in Miami, Securitize Founder & CEO Carlos Domingo breaks down why tokenized equities, stablecoins, and AI-powered “agentic trading” could radically transform global capital m

news.title: Broadridge says DLR processed nearly $8T in March with $354B average daily volume
news.summary: Broadridge announced its Distributed Ledger Repo (DLR) processed nearly $8 trillion in March and averaged $354 billion in daily repo transactions during the month, reporting 392% year-over-year growth.

news.title: Statement on Tokenized Securities
news.summary: Statement  # Statement on Tokenized Securities  Division of Corporation Finance, Division of Investment Management, Division of Trading and Markets  Washington D.C.  Jan. 28, 2026  ## Introduction  As part of an effort to provide greater clarity on the application of the federal

news.title: JPM Coin: Bank-Backed USD Deposit Token from Kinexys ...
news.summary: Discover how JPM Coin, a 1:1 bank-backed deposit token from Kinexys by J.P. Morgan, helps institutions unlock trapped capital and settle around the clock.

news.title: Fact Sheet: President Donald J. Trump Signs GENIUS Act ...
news.summary:
- Stablecoin issuers must comply with strict marketing rules to protect consumers from deceptive practices.
Crucially, they are forbidden from making misleading claims that their stablecoins are backed by the U.S. government, federally insured, or legal tender.
- The GENIUS Act aligns State and Federal stablecoin frameworks, ensuring fair and consistent regulation throughout the country.
- In the event of insolvency of a stablecoin issuer, the GENIUS Act prioritizes stablecoin holders’ claims over all other creditors, ensuring a final backstop of consumer protection.
**ENSURING U.S. DOLLAR GLOBAL RESERVE CURRENCY STATUS: ** By driving demand for U.S. Treasuries, stablecoins will play a crucial role in ensuring the continued global dominance of the U.S. dollar as the world’s reserve currency.
…
- The GENIUS Act explicitly subjects stablecoin issuers to the Bank Secrecy Act, thereby clearly obligating them to establish effective anti-money laundering and sanctions compliance programs with risk assessments, sanctions list verification, and customer identification.
- This legislation improves the Treasury Department’s ability to combat illicit stablecoin activities by enhancing its sanctions evasion and money laundering enforcement capabilities.

news.title: SEC issues interpretation clarifying how federal securities laws apply to crypto assets
news.summary: SEC published an interpretation clarifying how federal securities laws apply to certain crypto assets and transactions, including a taxonomy covering stablecoins and digital securities and guidance on airdrops, staking, and wrapped assets.

news.title: White House fact sheet: GENIUS Act signed into law (stablecoin framework)
news.summary: The White House says the GENIUS Act creates a federal regulatory system for stablecoins, including 100% reserve backing and monthly public reserve disclosures, and applies Bank Secrecy Act obligations to issuers.

news.title: Atlantic Council: mBridge processed ~4,000 cross-border transactions cumulatively worth ~$55.49B
news.summary: Atlantic Council reports mBridge has processed more than 4,000 cross-border transactions with cumulative value around $55.49B and that the digital yuan represents ~95.3% of total settlement volume.

news.title: HSBC expands tokenized deposit service to the United States
news.summary: HSBC announced an expansion of its tokenized deposit service to the U.S., extending availability of its tokenized deposit capability for eligible clients.

news.title: Treasury (FinCEN/OFAC) proposes rule to implement GENIUS Act stablecoin AML/sanctions requirements
news.summary: FinCEN and OFAC issued a joint proposed rule to implement GENIUS Act requirements for payment stablecoins, including anti-money laundering and sanctions compliance obligations, treating permitted payment stablecoin issuers as financial institutions under the Bank Secrecy Act.

news.title: Broadridge DLR April 2026 repo ADV hits $368B (nearly $8T monthly)
news.summary: Broadridge reported its Distributed Ledger Repo processed an average daily volume of $368B in April 2026, totaling nearly $8T for the month, reflecting sustained institutional adoption of tokenized settlement.

news.title: HSBC launches Tokenized Deposit Service in the United States
news.summary: HSBC announced the launch of its Tokenized Deposit Service (TDS) in the U.S., expanding its digital money capabilities for 24/7 on-chain domestic and cross-border funds movement for eligible corporate/institutional clients.

news.title: White House: GENIUS Act signed into law (stablecoin legislation)
news.summary: The White House fact sheet says the GENIUS Act explicitly subjects stablecoin issuers to the Bank Secrecy Act and strengthens AML/sanctions compliance expectations for issuers.

news.title: Broadridge: DLR platform processed $365B average daily repo volume in January 2026
news.summary: Broadridge announced its Distributed Ledger Repo (DLR) platform processed an average of $365B in daily repo transactions during January 2026, totaling $7.3T for the month.

news.title: Report: Project mBridge surpassed $55B in cross-border payments
news.summary: A news report says the China-led multi-CBDC project mBridge topped $55B in cross-border payments.

news.title: Broadridge DLR platform reaches US$368B ADV in April
news.summary: Securities Finance Times reports Broadridge's Distributed Ledger Repo (DLR) processed US$368B average daily volumes in April (nearly US$8T total for the month).

news.title: Crypto liquidations hit ~US$1.45B in 24 hours
news.summary: CoinSpeaker (via Yahoo Finance) reports ~US$1.45B liquidations over the last 24 hours in a sharp market downturn.

news.title: JPMorgan Kinexys + Mastercard + Ripple complete first cross-border tokenized Treasury redemption
news.summary: First near real-time cross-border, cross-bank redemption of a tokenized U.S. Treasury fund via XRP Ledger and bank rails. Asset leg cleared in ~3 seconds.

news.title: BlackRock BUIDL goes live on Uniswap via UniswapX
news.summary: $2.4B BUIDL fund becomes accessible to eligible investors through UniswapX — BlackRock's first direct DeFi protocol engagement.

news.title: SEC approves Nasdaq tokenized stock trading for Russell 1000
news.summary: Nasdaq can now support trading of eligible securities in either conventional format or as blockchain-based digital tokens. Initial scope: Russell 1000 + major ETFs.

news.title: Tokenized RWA market hits $29B in Q1 2026 (+263% YoY)
news.summary: Total tokenized RWA value on-chain (excl. stablecoins) reaches ~$29B, up from $7.9B in 2024. Tokenized Treasuries lead growth at $13.4B.

news.title: Broadridge DLR processes nearly $9T in December repo volume
news.summary: DLR platform on Canton Network processed $384B average daily volume in December 2025, scaling to ~$9T monthly aggregate.

news.title: Project mBridge crosses $55.5B in cross-border CBDC transactions
news.summary: China-led mBridge platform processed 4,047 transactions, ~95% denominated in digital yuan. BIS exited project leadership in late 2024.

news.title: October 10, 2025: $19.13B crypto liquidation — largest in history
news.summary: Trump's 100% tariff threat on China imports triggered cascade. 1.63M positions liquidated in 24h; $3.21B vanished in 60 seconds at 21:15 UTC.

news.title: GENIUS Act signed into US federal stablecoin law
news.summary: President Trump signed the GENIUS Act establishing federal framework for USD stablecoin issuance, routing institutional capital toward bank-issued tokenized deposits.

news.title: HKMA launches Project Ensemble Phase 2 (Ensemble^TX^) for 2026
news.summary: New phase to operationalize tokenized deposits across HKD, USD, CNH for institutional treasury management. Standard Chartered + Ant International integration.

news.title: Tokenization market projections: McKinsey $2T vs BCG $16-30T by 2030
news.summary: Divergent forecasts for RWA tokenization addressable market. Baseline trajectory suggests $30T by 2034 if G-SIB deployments continue scaling.
